description:
The AI notetaker for agents and teams

Grain is an AI notetaker and conversation intelligence platform that records video calls, Slack huddles, and in-person meetings to provide accurate summaries, insights, and coaching feedback. Unlike other notetaking tools, Grain captures all meeting content: video, desktop captured audio, and resulting transcripts and notes. We make it easy to share meaningful data with your clients and collaborators, and to transform your meeting data into actionable insights and deliverables using AI technology.
